title: Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor
text:
Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor

Your Trusted Source for Export Control, Technology Compliance, and Supply Chain Risk Intelligence

Staying compliant with evolving export controls, sanctions, and regulations has never been more challenging—or more essential. TechInsights' Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor delivers chip-level analysis and supply chain intelligence, helping compliance, legal, and policy teams detect and manage risks across the global semiconductor value chain before they impact operations.

Get Started

Stay Compliant. Reduce Risk. Make Informed Decisions.

Whether you're a Chief Compliance Officer, General Counsel, or Government Affairs professional, knowing the technology landscape ahead of your competitors gives you control over your compliance processes, procurement strategies, and global supply chains.

Deep Tech Reverse Engineering for Regulatory Clarity: Gain chip-level insights to understand technological capabilities and export classifications.
Curated Supply Chain Data at the Country, Industry, and Company Level: See detailed design, sourcing, and manufacturing data to assess market share, origin, and trade risk.
Customizable Policy Impact Tools: Analyze how export control changes affect your business, industry, or national economy.
Dedicated Support for Compliance, Regulatory, and Policy Teams: Empower internal teams with independent, validated data and expert guidance.

Stay Ahead of Emerging Global Compliance Risks

Our Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor provides the actionable intelligence you need to stay ahead in a complex, high-stakes environment.

Automated ECCN Mapping & Export Risk Flagging: TechInsights maps reverse engineering results directly to key ECCNs, including 3A090, 4A003, and 5A002. The platform assesses FDPR applicability, identifies deemed export risks, and highlights dual-use classifications under CCL Categories 3, 4, and 5.
Proactive Emerging Risk Detection: Users receive advance notice of teardowns targeting critical technologies such as AI accelerators, FPGAs, and high-performance memory.
Supply Chain Transparency & Traceability: The TechInsights Platform provides a complete Bill of Materials (BoM) with traceable design wins, along with reverse engineering insights for fab sourcing, origin country identification, and market share analysis across the supply chain.
Entity-Level Compliance Risk Tracker: TechInsights offers dynamic profiles of BIS-listed and high-risk entities, along with detailed insight into demand-side factors (end-use markets) and supply-side factors (fabs, chip designers, and countries of origin).

Chip & Subsystem Classification Engine: Export classification (ECCN) and dual-use classification guidance are provided, with direct links to component-level teardown reports in the TechLibrary and identification of U.S.-origin IP, tooling, and dependencies.
Early Content Access for Strategic Compliance Planning: Subscribers gain early visibility into upcoming TechInsights reports and receive exclusive briefings from technology and market experts.
Policy & Guidance Tracker: The service includes structured summaries of BIS regulations and export control updates, a historical database of major policy changes such as the U.S. chip restrictions from October 2022/2023, and expert commentary from TechInsights’ geopolitical and regulatory specialists.
Expert Advisory & Strategic Insights: Clients benefit from quarterly briefings led by TechInsights’ export control experts, featuring analysis of emerging enforcement trends, anticipated policy changes, and global trade developments.

 

Protect your operations, reputation, and bottom line.

With unmatched access to semiconductor reverse engineering and supply chain analysis, TechInsights enables organizations to maintain compliance certainty, even as technology and regulations rapidly evolve.

 

Create Account

Request a Demo

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the TechInsights Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor?

The Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor is a premium intelligence service that delivers chip-level reverse engineering insights, export classification data, and supply chain transparency to help organizations manage regulatory risk and ensure compliance with global export controls and sanctions.

Who should use the Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor?

This service is designed for compliance officers, legal and regulatory teams, government agencies, policy makers, and supply chain professionals who need accurate, timely information to navigate export control regulations and supply chain risks within the semiconductor industry.

How does TechInsights help with ECCN classification?

TechInsights directly maps its reverse engineering analysis to Export Control Classification Numbers (ECCNs), helping users identify classifications such as 3A090, 4A003, and 5A002. The service also highlights dual-use designations under CCL Categories 3, 4, and 5, and evaluates FDPR applicability and deemed export risks.

Can this tool help anticipate emerging technology compliance risks?

Yes. Subscribers receive advance notice of teardowns focused on critical and sensitive technologies like AI accelerators, FPGAs, and high-performance memory, helping organizations prepare for potential regulatory changes before they happen.

What supply chain insights are included?

The Monitor provides a detailed Bill of Materials (BoM), design win tracing, fab sourcing information, country of origin data, and market share insights for upstream suppliers, foundries, and end-use markets.

Does the Platform offer entity-level risk assessments?

Yes. The service includes dynamic profiles of BIS-listed and high-risk entities, providing insight into both demand-side markets and supply-side dependencies such as fabs, chip designers, and source countries.

How often is content and data updated?

TechInsights continuously updates the Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor with new teardown data, regulatory changes, policy updates, and expert advisory content, ensuring users have access to the latest information.

Is expert guidance available as part of this service?

Yes. Subscribers receive quarterly briefings and strategic insights from TechInsights’ export control and geopolitical experts, along with exclusive access to industry-specific forecasts and regulatory trend analyses.

Can the service support internal compliance audits and risk assessments?

Absolutely. The Monitor provides the data and analysis necessary for internal compliance checks, regulatory filings, supply chain risk evaluations, and export control documentation, supporting proactive risk management and audit readiness.

How can I get started with the Compliance and Supply Chain Monitor?

To learn more or request a demo, click here or contact a TechInsights representative for a personalized consultation.
